creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Jan 25 13:13:21 2014
New Revision: 341031
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341031
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341031/

Log:
  MFH: r340298
  
  - Stage support
  - Fix build with clang
  
  PR:		185333
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Added:
  branches/2014Q1/sysutils/kdirstat/files/
     - copied from r340298, head/sysutils/kdirstat/files/
Modified:
  branches/2014Q1/sysutils/kdirstat/Makefile
Directory Properties:
  branches/2014Q1/   (props changed)

Modified: branches/2014Q1/sysutils/kdirstat/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- branches/2014Q1/sysutils/kdirstat/Makefile	Sat Jan 25 13:12:05 2014	(r341030)
+++ branches/2014Q1/sysutils/kdirstat/Makefile	Sat Jan 25 13:13:21 2014	(r341031)
@@ -20,7 +20,6 @@ USE_KDE4=	automoc4 kdelibs kdeprefix lib
 USE_QT4=	moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		'/^Categories/s|=.*|=Qt;KDE;Utility;|' \
@@ -30,6 +29,6 @@ post-patch:
 		${WRKSRC}/src/kdirreadjob.cpp
 
 post-install:
-	@${LN} -sf k4dirstat ${PREFIX}/bin/kdirstat
+	@${LN} -sf k4dirstat ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/kdirstat
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
